hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'mix\s+ecto\.reset'; then echo 'đźš« Dangerous: mix ecto.reset destroys and recreates the database. Use mix ecto.rollback for safe rollbacks.' && exit 2; fi; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+push\s+.*(-f|--force)'; then echo 'đźš« Dangerous: Force push overwrites remote history. Use --force-with-lease for safer force pushes.' && exit 2; fi; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'MIX_ENV=prod'; then echo 'đźš« Dangerous: Running with MIX_ENV=prod locally risks unintended production effects.' && exit 2; fi
hooks.description: Block dangerous operations (ecto.reset, force push, MIX_ENV=prod)

hooks.command: EXT="${CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH##*.}"; if [ "$EXT" = "ex" ] || [ "$EXT" = "exs" ] || [ "$EXT" = "heex" ]; then echo 'đź’ˇ Reminder: Did you invoke the relevant elixir-phoenix-guide skill before writing this file? If not, invoke it now and verify your code follows the rules.'; fi; exit 0
hooks.description: Remind about skill invocation for Elixir files

hooks.command: FILTERED=$(grep -v '^\s*#' "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILTERED" | grep -qE 'def\s+(mount|handle_event|handle_info|handle_call|handle_cast|render|init|terminate)\(' && ! echo "$FILTERED" | grep -B1 'def\s\+(mount|handle_event|handle_info|handle_call|handle_cast|render|init|terminate)\(' | grep -q '@impl'; then echo 'âš ď¸Ź  Missing @impl true before callback function. Add @impl true before mount, handle_event, handle_info, handle_call, handle_cast, render, init, or terminate callbacks.' && exit 2; fi

if grep -qE '(upload_path|file_path|uploads_dir)\s*=\s*["'\''](/|priv/)' "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'đźš« Hardcoded file path detected. Use Application.get_env(:app, :config_key) instead.' && exit 2; fi

if grep -qE '(max_file_size|file_size_limit|max_upload|max_size)\s*=\s*[0-9]{7,}' "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'đźš« Hardcoded file size limit detected (7+ digits). Move to Application config.' && exit 2; fi

COLLAPSED=$(tr '\n' ' ' < "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$COLLAPSED" | grep -qE 'if\s+[^d]+\s+do\s+[^e]*if\s+[^d]+\s+do'; then echo 'âš ď¸Ź  Nested if/else detected. Consider using pattern matching or case statements for more idiomatic Elixir.' && exit 1; fi

COLLAPSED=$(tr '\n' ' ' < "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$COLLAPSED" | grep -qE '\|>\s*Enum\.(map|filter)\([^)]+\)\s*\|>\s*Enum\.(map|filter)\('; then echo 'âš ď¸Ź  Multiple Enum operations detected. Consider using a for comprehension or Enum.reduce for better performance.' && exit 1; fi
hooks.description: Warn on inefficient Enum chains (handles multiline)

hooks.command: if grep -qE 'Enum\.(map|reduce|each).*<>' "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'âš ď¸Ź  String concatenation with <> in Enum operations. Consider using IO lists or Enum.join for better performance.' && exit 1; fi
hooks.description: Warn on string concatenation in loops

hooks.command: if grep -qE 'def static_paths' "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then PATHS=$(grep -A10 'def static_paths' "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" | grep -oE '"[^"]+"' | tr -d '"' | tr '\n' ' '); REFS=$(grep -hoE '/[a-z_]+/' "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" | sort -u | tr -d '/' | tr '\n' ' '); for ref in $REFS; do echo " $PATHS " | grep -qw "$ref" || echo "âš ď¸Ź  Path reference '/$ref/' found but '$ref' not in static_paths(). Add to lib/my_app_web.ex: def static_paths, do: ~w(assets $ref favicon.ico)" && exit 2; done; fi
hooks.description: Block file path references not in static_paths

hooks.command: if grep -qE '<\.(flash_group|flash)' "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'đźš« .flash_group component is deprecated in Phoenix 1.8+. Flash handling is now automatic in layouts. Remove <.flash_group> calls.' && exit 2; fi; if grep -qE 'form_for\(' "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'đźš« form_for is deprecated. Use <.form for={to_form(@changeset)}> instead.' && exit 2; fi; if grep -qE 'live_redirect|live_patch' "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'đźš« live_redirect/live_patch are deprecated. Use <.link navigate={path}> or push_navigate/push_patch instead.' && exit 2; fi
hooks.description: Block deprecated Phoenix components and functions

hooks.command: if grep -qE 'auto_upload:\s*true' "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'âš ď¸Ź  auto_upload: true detected. This requires special handling with handle_progress/3. Most apps should use manual upload (remove auto_upload: true and add a submit button). See phoenix-uploads skill for details.' && exit 1; fi

EXT="${CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH##*.}"; if [ "$EXT" = "ex" ] || [ "$EXT" = "exs" ]; then if ! echo "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '_test\.exs$|/test/'; then if grep -qE 'IO\.inspect\(|dbg\(|IO\.puts\(' "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'âš ď¸Ź  Debug statement detected (IO.inspect, dbg, or IO.puts). Remove before committing â€” these should not reach production.' && exit 1; fi; fi; fi
hooks.description: Warn on debug statements outside test files (IO.inspect, dbg, IO.puts)

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_HOOK_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'mix\.exs$'; then echo 'đź’ˇ Dependencies file (mix.exs) modified. Consider running:'; echo '   mix deps.audit  - check for known vulnerabilities'; echo '   mix hex.audit   - verify package checksums'; echo '   mix sobelow     - static security analysis'; exit 0; fi
hooks.description: Remind about security auditing when mix.exs is modified
